_comment: v5.11.0 — Codex follow-up review (B4.2). Closes the second half of B4: countable propositions «<X> туралы <N> сөйлем құрастыр» + explicit epistemic refusal «Дәлелсіз тұжырым жаса». Pre-v5.11.0: «Қасқыр туралы үш сөйлем құрастыр» surfaced one tangential fact regardless of N; «Дәлелсіз тұжырым жаса» fell to retrieval. Post-v5.11.0: detectors `discourse::extract_propositions_request` (returns subject + count, accepts Cyrillic numerals OR ASCII digits OR «бірнеше» quantifier; clamps to 8) and `discourse::is_unprovable_assertion_request`. Handler builds N provable «X — Y» sentences via new `collect_provable_isa_objects` BFS over extracted + derived facts; honest variant fires when M < N. Epistemic refusal routes to dedicated template family naming WHY the request can't be honoured (architectural commitment to source-grounded answers) — distinct from safety refusal (high-stakes-domain advice gating). Closes B4 — the generation arc atop the v5.9.0 G3.0 substrate.

cases.query: Тоғыз планета туралы үш сөйлем құрастыр.
